description: A student needs to renew a library book they have checked out.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and retrieve their library account information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent pulls up the student's library record.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the checked-out book to see if it is eligible for renewal (i.e., no other holds on it).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the book can be renewed.

nodes.task_description: Process the renewal and inform the student of the new due date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully renews the book and communicates the new due date.
